directive: Run browser automation through the browser-harness executable on PATH; do not invoke the harness through package runners or Python module/script entrypoints such as uv run browser-harness, python -m browser_harness.run, or python src/browser_harness/run.py.
rationale: The repo exposes browser-harness as the intended command and its usage guidance explicitly rejects cd and uv run wrappers. Direct CLI execution keeps the daemon bootstrap and pre-imported helper environment consistent.

source_evidence.text: The usage block invokes browser-harness directly and states to invoke it as browser-harness on PATH with no cd and no uv run.
The tool call shape shows browser-harness reading a heredoc and notes run.py calls ensure_daemon before executing code.
The project registers the browser-harness console script as the supported entrypoint.
